TextData:
Pre-ceremony
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

Pre-ceremony
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Procession
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Procession
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Exchanging of Rings
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Exchanging of Rings
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Reception
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to bring proceedings to a close.

The Reception
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to bring proceedings to a close.
Let us watch in silent reverence as <Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A> and <Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A> make their entrance into this most holy of halls.
Let us watch in silent reverence as Firstname Lastname and Firstname Lastname make their entrance into this most holy of halls.
Was that not the most beautiful thing you've ever seen? It was the most beautiful thing <Emphasis>I've</Emphasis> ever seen—and I've seen a lot of these, kupo!
Was that not the most beautiful thing you've ever seen? It was the most beautiful thing *I've* ever seen—and I've seen a lot of these, kupo!

Ahem! <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> here has toiled day and night, night and day─give or take a few days and nights─to create a truly <Emphasis>unique</Emphasis> symbol of <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>his<Else/>her</If> devotion.
Ahem! Lastname here has toiled day and night, night and day─give or take a few days and nights─to create a truly *unique* symbol of his devotion.
Ahem! <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has called upon a trusted companion to craft the ring <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>he<Else/>she</If> brings today.
Ahem! Lastname has called upon a trusted companion to craft the ring he brings today.
Ahem! <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has traveled the realm in search of the perfect ring with which to express <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>his<Else/>her</If> devotion.
Ahem! Lastname has traveled the realm in search of the perfect ring with which to express his devotion.
Ahem! <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> brings with <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>him<Else/>her</If> a ring which is special in more ways than one.
Ahem! Lastname brings with him a ring which is special in more ways than one.
And then we have <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s ring.
And then we have Lastname's ring.
And then we have <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s ring.
And then we have Lastname's ring.
And then we have <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s ring.
And then we have Lastname's ring.
And then we have <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s ring.
And then we have Lastname's ring.
<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A> and <Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>.
Firstname Lastname and Firstname Lastname.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─like the Builder Himself, you have embraced creation, and with thine own hands fashioned a ring the likes of which none have heretofore seen.
Lastname─like the Builder Himself, you have embraced creation, and with thine own hands fashioned a ring the likes of which none have heretofore seen.

<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─Menphina teaches us that our worth is measured not only by the love we receive, but by the love we give. The ring you bring today serves as a testament to that love.
Lastname─Menphina teaches us that our worth is measured not only by the love we receive, but by the love we give. The ring you bring today serves as a testament to that love.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─as the Traders teach, our lives are an everlasting circle of exchange, not unlike the ring for which you have bartered.
Lastname─as the Traders teach, our lives are an everlasting circle of exchange, not unlike the ring for which you have bartered.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─like the path of the Wanderer, some roads are more winding than first they appear. Such is the road your ring has taken.
Lastname─like the path of the Wanderer, some roads are more winding than first they appear. Such is the road your ring has taken.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─the Scholar provides us with such knowledge as would allow us to bend the world to our will. You have used this knowledge to create a ring most wondrous.
Lastname─the Scholar provides us with such knowledge as would allow us to bend the world to our will. You have used this knowledge to create a ring most wondrous.

<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>─the Warden embraces all truths, yet She values none more highly than the truth which two friends share. Verily, the ring you have brought today is a true symbol of friendship.
Lastname─the Warden embraces all truths, yet She values none more highly than the truth which two friends share. Verily, the ring you have brought today is a true symbol of friendship.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>. The Navigator guides us all unto that which we seek. Thus did you happen upon this ring.
Lastname. The Navigator guides us all unto that which we seek. Thus did you happen upon this ring.

<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>. As the Spinner weaves our fates, so too does She weave the fates of all creation. The ring you have brought for your partner was meant for this day from the first.
Lastname. As the Spinner weaves our fates, so too does She weave the fates of all creation. The ring you have brought for your partner was meant for this day from the first.
A journey that will see <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> and <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> to places that they never imagined.
A journey that will see Lastname and Lastname to places that they never imagined.
Enter, <Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, <Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>.
Enter, Firstname Lastname, Firstname Lastname.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has toiled long to craft this flawless band.
Lastname has toiled long to craft this flawless band.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> oversaw the creation of this flawless band.
Lastname oversaw the creation of this flawless band.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has brought today this flawless band.
Lastname has brought today this flawless band.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> presents this special ring and the untold history it carries.
Lastname presents this special ring and the untold history it carries.

<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has called upon <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>his<Else/>her</If> inner talents to forge <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>his<Else/>her</If> partner's ring.
Lastname has called upon his inner talents to forge his partner's ring.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has called upon a trusted companion to create <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>his<Else/>her</If> partner's ring.
Lastname has called upon a trusted companion to create his partner's ring.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has reached deep to procure <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>his<Else/>her</If> partner's ring.
Lastname has reached deep to procure his partner's ring.
<Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> has chosen this unique band for reasons known only to <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>he and his<Else/>she and her</If> partner alone.
Lastname has chosen this unique band for reasons known only to he and his partner alone.
<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A> and <Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>...
Firstname Lastname and Firstname Lastname...

Ceremony Setting Confirmation

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>※The ceremony will automatically begin 20 minutes after settings have been finalized.

The eternity bell may be used to commence the ceremony early, but please ensure all parties have arrived before doing so.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Select whose settings are to be used:

Ceremony Setting Confirmation

**※The ceremony will automatically begin 20 minutes after settings have been finalized.

The eternity bell may be used to commence the ceremony early, but please ensure all parties have arrived before doing so.**

Select whose settings are to be used:
...which, as luck would have it, our couple has prepared for us all! You <Emphasis>have</Emphasis> prepared some...right?
...which, as luck would have it, our couple has prepared for us all! You *have* prepared some...right?
For <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s sake, let us hope <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>he<Else/>she</If> doesn't trust that companion <Emphasis>too</Emphasis> much, kupo!
For Lastname's sake, let us hope he doesn't trust that companion *too* much, kupo!
So special, in fact, that <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>he<Else/>she</If> wouldn't even tell me why, kupo!
So special, in fact, that he wouldn't even tell me why, kupo!
Crafted with <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>his<Else/>her</If> own two hands─each strike of the chaser hammer a declaration of everlasting faith, kupo!
Crafted with his own two hands─each strike of the chaser hammer a declaration of everlasting faith, kupo!
Crafted by a fellow adventurer under <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>'s strict supervision, kupo.
Crafted by a fellow adventurer under Lastname's strict supervision, kupo.
A ring whose deep personal significance is probably better explained by <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(4),0))>him<Else/>her</If>self, kupo.
A ring whose deep personal significance is probably better explained by Lastname himself, kupo.
And with it signifies <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>his<Else/>her</If> commitment to provide for <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(3),0))>his<Else/>her</If> partner, no matter the cost.
And with it signifies his commitment to provide for his partner, no matter the cost.
Now, <Split(<Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A>, ,1)/> and <Split(<Unknown0A>E803</Unknown0A>, ,1)/>...
Now, Lastname and Lastname...

The Exchanging of Vows
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

The Exchanging of Vows
The hosts may ring their eternity bells to proceed.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target confirmed. Removing safety locks.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target confirmed. Removing safety locks.

Updating target assessment.
Switching to secondary attack routine.

Updating target assessment.
Switching to secondary attack routine.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Gabriel activation complete. Commencing attack.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Gabriel activation complete. Commencing attack.

Analyzing target behavior.
Ascertaining potential weaknesses.

Analyzing target behavior.
Ascertaining potential weaknesses.

Target continues to resist elimination.
Assigning all processing power to target analysis.

Target continues to resist elimination.
Assigning all processing power to target analysis.

Target continues to resist elimination.
Does not compute. Does not compute.

Target continues to resist elimination.
Does not compute. Does not compute.

Damage sustained has exceeded acceptable limits.
Retreating to prevent seizure of technology by enemy forces.

Damage sustained has exceeded acceptable limits.
Retreating to prevent seizure of technology by enemy forces.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target silenced. Returning to base.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target silenced. Returning to base.

Close...so close...
I hunger...

Close...so close...
I hunger...

What manner of fiend is this!?
No matter, the monoceros will purify its wicked soul!

What manner of fiend is this!?
No matter, the monoceros will purify its wicked soul!

The monoceros will expel this hateful aura!
We must draw these apparitions to the center!

The monoceros will expel this hateful aura!
We must draw these apparitions to the center!

Not this again...
Monoceros, one more time!

Not this again...
Monoceros, one more time!

You must be the one I've heard so much about.
Let's see if there's any truth to the rumors!

You must be the one I've heard so much about.
Let's see if there's any truth to the rumors!

They say you got the better of Zenos himself.
Judging by what I've seen so far, I find that hard to believe!

They say you got the better of Zenos himself.
Judging by what I've seen so far, I find that hard to believe!

It seems you were all you're cracked up to be.
Consider me impressed!

It seems you were all you're cracked up to be.
Consider me impressed!

This round goes to you.
I'll look forward to going toe-to-toe with you again!

This round goes to you.
I'll look forward to going toe-to-toe with you again!

Is that all you've got?
Makes me wonder what all the fuss was about.

Is that all you've got?
Makes me wonder what all the fuss was about.

Do not be disheartened, men!
This is far from over!

Do not be disheartened, men!
This is far from over!

Everyone, divert your aether to the pyrobolus!
We'll blast those Resistance swine to the seventh hell!

Everyone, divert your aether to the pyrobolus!
We'll blast those Resistance swine to the seventh hell!

Activating weapon systems.
Magitek bartizan operational.

Activating weapon systems.
Magitek bartizan operational.

Deploying timed mines.
All friendly units are requested to clear the area.

Deploying timed mines.
All friendly units are requested to clear the area.

Oh, how I have waited for this moment.
Let us see whose flame burns brightest!

Oh, how I have waited for this moment.
Let us see whose flame burns brightest!

At last, a worthy foe!
Now, you shall witness my true power!

At last, a worthy foe!
Now, you shall witness my true power!

All in all, a poor display.
How disappointing.

All in all, a poor display.
How disappointing.

Deploy reflector bits!
I wonder, can the test subject calculate the trajectory of a beam of light?

Deploy reflector bits!
I wonder, can the test subject calculate the trajectory of a beam of light?

UNIDENTIFIED RECRUITS DETECTED.
BOOTING BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL.

UNIDENTIFIED RECRUITS DETECTED.
BOOTING BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL.

BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL LOADED.
COMMENCING DRILL PROGRAM.

BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL LOADED.
COMMENCING DRILL PROGRAM.

COMMENCING FINAL ASSESSMENT.
BOOTING ANNIHILATION MODE.

COMMENCING FINAL ASSESSMENT.
BOOTING ANNIHILATION MODE.

RECRUITS FAILING TO FOLLOW ORDERS DETECTED.
BOOTING PUNISHMENT PROTOCOL.

RECRUITS FAILING TO FOLLOW ORDERS DETECTED.
BOOTING PUNISHMENT PROTOCOL.

SYSTEM DAMAGE: 95%.
ENTERING SAFE MODE...
ABORTING BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL...

SYSTEM DAMAGE: 95%.
ENTERING SAFE MODE...
ABORTING BASIC TRAINING PROTOCOL...

May the lightning tear through you!
Let your dying screams fill the air!

May the lightning tear through you!
Let your dying screams fill the air!

I have to hand it to you, I never thought you'd make it this far.
I'm going to enjoy this...

I have to hand it to you, I never thought you'd make it this far.
I'm going to enjoy this...

I can't let you lot have all the fun.
Why not come over here and let me take a swing?

I can't let you lot have all the fun.
Why not come over here and let me take a swing?

Scared, eh?
I reckon cowards like you are hardly worth my time, anyway!

Scared, eh?
I reckon cowards like you are hardly worth my time, anyway!

Come back when you've toughened up!
I'll be waiting.

Come back when you've toughened up!
I'll be waiting.

Not quite what I had in mind.
Dawon, let's try that again!

Not quite what I had in mind.
Dawon, let's try that again!

The eale has been...cowed!?
Forward, golems! Assist him!

The eale has been...cowed!?
Forward, golems! Assist him!

The tunnel armor will breach their defenses.
It's up to us to keep it in one piece until it's through!

The tunnel armor will breach their defenses.
It's up to us to keep it in one piece until it's through!

Brionac has fallen!?
Quickly, deploy reinforcements!

Brionac has fallen!?
Quickly, deploy reinforcements!

I knew those helldivers were a waste of time!
Send reinforcements─ some proper soldiers!

I knew those helldivers were a waste of time!
Send reinforcements─ some proper soldiers!

Have you finished preparing the artillery?
Then what are you waiting for!? Fire!

Have you finished preparing the artillery?
Then what are you waiting for!? Fire!

Haha! We're through the wall!
But we mustn't get complacent. It's not over yet.

Haha! We're through the wall!
But we mustn't get complacent. It's not over yet.

We can't give these durs another ilm.
Take no prisoners! Kill every last one of them!

We can't give these durs another ilm.
Take no prisoners! Kill every last one of them!

They leave me with no choice.
The day has come to demonstrate the power of the auracite!

They leave me with no choice.
The day has come to demonstrate the power of the auracite!

Retreat! Retreat!
Burn all documents, execute the prisoners!

Retreat! Retreat!
Burn all documents, execute the prisoners!

It seems he's eluded us, for now, at least.
We'll need to get past that barricade.

It seems he's eluded us, for now, at least.
We'll need to get past that barricade.

A number of our countrymen were taken captive.
They're likely being held somewhere in the castrum.

A number of our countrymen were taken captive.
They're likely being held somewhere in the castrum.

By denying the path of righteousness, you have sealed your fate.
The heavens have spoken, and they are wroth indeed!

By denying the path of righteousness, you have sealed your fate.
The heavens have spoken, and they are wroth indeed!

I am Adrammelech...
Now know regret, a sinner's recompense.

I am Adrammelech...
Now know regret, a sinner's recompense.

There's no time to dwell on that.
We must press on!

There's no time to dwell on that.
We must press on!

Combat functions compromised.
Abandoning warmachina.

Combat functions compromised.
Abandoning warmachina.

The crack of lightning, the roar of flame,
The rumble of earth, the grip of ice,
The rush of water, the howl of wind.
At their center, I stand. Alone and omnipotent.

The crack of lightning, the roar of flame,
The rumble of earth, the grip of ice,
The rush of water, the howl of wind.
At their center, I stand. Alone and omnipotent.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target sighted.

This is test subject VIII, Dabog.
Target sighted.

The tunnel armor is under attack!
Strike the enemy's core!

The tunnel armor is under attack!
Strike the enemy's core!

Operational time limit exceeded.
Firing all armaments.

Operational time limit exceeded.
Firing all armaments.

They've finally run out of soldiers to throw at us, it seems.
Forward!

They've finally run out of soldiers to throw at us, it seems.
Forward!

Careful now. Something's not right.
Be on your guard.

Careful now. Something's not right.
Be on your guard.

Our efforts will all be for naught if the tunnel armor fails now.
Do whatever it takes to defend it!

Our efforts will all be for naught if the tunnel armor fails now.
Do whatever it takes to defend it!
You have never seen a blade like <Emphasis>this</Emphasis>!
You have never seen a blade like *this*!
This does not bode well, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. We have to stop them!
This does not bode well, Player. We have to stop them!
Bathed in flame!? Fall back, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>!
Bathed in flame!? Fall back, Player!
Hurry, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. We must put an end to this. For their sakes...
Hurry, Player. We must put an end to this. For their sakes...
She's become a vessel for the blades' power... <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, I'm afraid she must be slain. There is no other way.
She's become a vessel for the blades' power... Player, I'm afraid she must be slain. There is no other way.
Prepare yourself, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. She compels them to march.
Prepare yourself, Player. She compels them to march.

エーテルを凝縮している……！？
障害となるテンパードたちを、排除しなければ……！

エーテルを凝縮している……！？
障害となるテンパードたちを、排除しなければ……！
Mine is the just path. The <Emphasis>righteous</Emphasis> path! And I will not suffer a second betrayal!
Mine is the just path. The *righteous* path! And I will not suffer a second betrayal!

聖剣にエーテルが充填されています！
大技に警戒してください！

聖剣にエーテルが充填されています！
大技に警戒してください！
I can feel my power growing! <Emphasis>Spreading</Emphasis>! Hahaha, soon my traps will be sprung!
I can feel my power growing! *Spreading*! Hahaha, soon my traps will be sprung!

Warning: Central control system failure.
Warni─<bzzzt> <Emphasis>I return to myself at last</Emphasis>!

Warning: Central control system failure.
Warni─<bzzzt> *I return to myself at last*!

Your frail, feeble flesh belies such sumptuous souls.
I must have them! I must have them all!

Your frail, feeble flesh belies such sumptuous souls.
I must have them! I must have them all!

No! Something is wrong... My body, it─<bzzzt>
Corruption detected in spectral data. Readying emergency system purge.

No! Something is wrong... My body, it─<bzzzt>
Corruption detected in spectral data. Readying emergency system purge.

...No! I will not─ <bzzzt> Reactors reaching critical mass.
Rebooting system...

...No! I will not─ <bzzzt> Reactors reaching critical mass.
Rebooting system...

Central control system online─ <bzzzt> Nooo─ <bzzzt>
Corrupted data...successfully...purged...

Central control system online─ <bzzzt> Nooo─ <bzzzt>
Corrupted data...successfully...purged...
So you are the <Emphasis>liberator</Emphasis> of whom the people speak... Come. I would take your measure.
So you are the *liberator* of whom the people speak... Come. I would take your measure.

罠を仕掛けさせてもらった。
よもや、卑怯などとは言うまいな……？

罠を仕掛けさせてもらった。
よもや、卑怯などとは言うまいな……？

Target appears...unharmed!
Requesting assistance! I repeat, requesting assistance!

Target appears...unharmed!
Requesting assistance! I repeat, requesting assistance!

Transmission protocols active...
Submitting request for reinforcements.

Transmission protocols active...
Submitting request for reinforcements.

Resubmitting request for reinforcements...
Altering attack pattern!

Resubmitting request for reinforcements...
Altering attack pattern!
Hope you weren't planning to keep <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>him</If> all to yourself. We still have a score to settle from the castrum.
Hope you weren't planning to keep her all to yourself. We still have a score to settle from the castrum.
Infiltrate the <Emphasis>Dalriada</Emphasis>
Infiltrate the *Dalriada*

I-Impossible! ...Ugh, there are far better uses of my time than this.
The others should prove more than enough to deal with you.

I-Impossible! ...Ugh, there are far better uses of my time than this.
The others should prove more than enough to deal with you.
Mark me, savages: you <Emphasis>will</Emphasis> pay for this!
Mark me, savages: you *will* pay for this!

Ugh... I mustn't succumb to the flames. Not yet...
I'll not sully his memory by giving up now!

Ugh... I mustn't succumb to the flames. Not yet...
I'll not sully his memory by giving up now!

Legatus Basch taught me well, as you will now see.
I pour my all into this blade, kissed by the flames of Mannatheihwo!

Legatus Basch taught me well, as you will now see.
I pour my all into this blade, kissed by the flames of Mannatheihwo!

Intruder alert! Intruder alert!
Defense systems have been activated!

Intruder alert! Intruder alert!
Defense systems have been activated!
Oi! How many times do I have to teach this lesson, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>girl<Else/>boy</If>? When I put you down, you <Emphasis>stay</Emphasis> down!
Oi! How many times do I have to teach this lesson, girl? When I put you down, you *stay* down!

I see you've found my cavaliers, good.
A fine opportunity to test the battle capabilities of the clibanarius.

I see you've found my cavaliers, good.
A fine opportunity to test the battle capabilities of the clibanarius.

ああ、ちゃんと買い物できなかったのカァ……
じゃあ、呪われても仕方ないネェ！

ああ、ちゃんと買い物できなかったのカァ……
じゃあ、呪われても仕方ないネェ！

DeSTroy, dEstROY, DesTROY...

BARRage, barrAGE, BaRraGe...

<If(PlayerParameter(4))>Mistress<Else/>Master</If> <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, it looks like <Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A> decided to visit!
Mistress Player, it looks like Firstname Lastname decided to visit!
Guess what, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>Mistress<Else/>Master</If> <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! <Unknown0A>E802</Unknown0A> is here!
Guess what, Mistress Player! Firstname Lastname is here!

<If(PlayerParameter(4))>Mistress<Else/>Master</If> <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, a structure has been completed! You need but access the appropriate logboard to give it a final inspection!
Mistress Player, a structure has been completed! You need but access the appropriate logboard to give it a final inspection!
